ham.subject: Weekly Marketing Newsletter - Exclusive Deals Inside!
ham.body:
Hi there,

Hope you’re doing great! It’s time for our weekly update with the best offers on your favorite products.

---
**Deal of the Week**

Aapke liye hum laaye hain 20% discount on all kitchen appliances. Use code: KITCHEN20 at checkout.

**New Arrivals**

Check out our latest collection of smart wearables that will help you track your health in real time.

**Customer Spotlight**

Rani from Jaipur shares how our eco-friendly bamboo toothbrush saved her money and the planet.

---

Shop now and make the most of these limited-time offers. If you have any questions, reply to this email and we’ll get back to you within 24 hours.

Thank you for being a valued customer!

Best regards,

The Team

Follow us on social media for daily updates.

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Pending – Immediate Action Required!
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #123456) was not delivered due to an unpaid fee of Rs. 500. To prevent shipment cancellation, please verify your account and pay the fee within 24 hours.

Click <URL> to confirm your payment and secure your delivery.

If you do not take action, the shipment will be returned to sender and additional penalties may apply.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
